titleStmt.title: SII 26.166: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 166. (A.R. No. 157 of 1909.) SAṄGRĀMANALLŪR, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription records the gift, made by the king, for the merit of māmaḍi (uncle), of the village of Dēvanpāḍi alias Vīranārāyaṇanallūr in Kāvāḍikkā-nāḍu, with all its taxes, in favour of the image of the deity Tribhuvana- sundarar setup in the temple of Vīrachōḻīchchuramuḍaiyār and for the celebration of the marriage (of the deity). It is stated that the village was gifted as a dēvadāna to provide for lamps in the temple. It is further stated that the supervision of the gift was not to be done by the sāmantars and the executive authorities but only by the Śrīmāhēśvarar and the temple servants.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koneriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ Āḷuṭaiyār viracoḷiccuramuṭaiyār koyililThese letters seem to have been wantonly erased. nam Olai kuṭuttaparicāvatu māmaṭikku naṉṟākat tiripuvanacuntararai Eḻuntaruḷuvittu tirukkalliyāṇam paṇṇukiṟapotu kāvāṭikkā nāṭṭu tevanpāṭiyāna viranārāyaṇanallūril Iṟai puravu siddhāyam Elavai Ukavai polivuṭṭākac cāmantar
peṟu Antarāyappeṟu maṉṟupāṭu teṇṭakuṟṟa maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭutum kiḻpuravumayiṟkāṇamu maṟṟum Epperpaṭṭatum Ikkoyilukku cantiyā tipattukku Uṭalāka koṇṭu varuvatāka Ivvūr tevatāṉamāka nīrvārttukkuṭuttom Ivvūr Ārāyumiṭattu cāmantaratikārañ ceyvārkaḷ Ārāyakkaṭavarallavākavum ṇṭattu Ikkoyi śrīmāheśvarar devakaṉmikaḷe Ārāñcu Ā
rāñcamutal tiruviḷakkukkuṭalāka kuṭuttom nantamāranār pāṟpeṭuttukkuṭukka Ivai viranārāṇa viraciṅkatevan Eḻuttu § svastiśrī .
Digital edition of SII 26.166 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
